briefdescription.para: Function signature for creating an instance of the associated object type. @SINCE_1_0.0.

memberdef.definition: using Dali::TypeInfo::ActionFunction = bool (*)(BaseObject*, const Dali::String&, const Property::Map&)
memberdef.name: ActionFunction

briefdescription.para: Function signature for creating scriptable actions @SINCE_1_0.0.

memberdef.definition: using Dali::TypeInfo::SignalConnectorFunction = bool (*)(BaseObject* object, ConnectionTrackerInterface* tracker, const Dali::String& signalName, FunctorDelegate* functor)
memberdef.name: SignalConnectorFunction

briefdescription.para: Connects a callback function with the object's signals.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
object
The object providing the signal
tracker
Used to disconnect the signal
signalName
The signal to connect to
functor
A newly allocated FunctorDelegate
True if the signal was connected
If a signal was connected, ownership of functor was passed to CallbackBase. Otherwise the caller is responsible for deleting the unused functor.

memberdef.definition: using Dali::TypeInfo::SetPropertyFunction = void (*)(BaseObject* object, Property::Index index, const Property::Value& value)
memberdef.name: SetPropertyFunction

briefdescription.para: Callback to set an event-thread only property.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
object
The object whose property should be set
index
The index of the property being set
value
The new value of the property for the object specified
PropertyRegistration.

memberdef.definition: using Dali::TypeInfo::GetPropertyFunction = Property::Value (*)(BaseObject* object, Property::Index index)
memberdef.name: GetPropertyFunction

briefdescription.para: Callback to get the value of an event-thread only property.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
object
The object whose property value is required
index
The index of the property required
The current value of the property for the object specified
PropertyRegistration.

briefdescription.para: Allows the creation of an empty TypeInfo handle. @SINCE_1_0.0.
Destructor.

detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods. @SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: This copy constructor is required for (smart) pointer semantics.
This assignment operator is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
rhs
A reference to the copied handle
A reference to this

briefdescription.para: Move constructor.
Move assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_9.22
rhs
A reference to the moved handle
A reference to this handle

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the type name for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
String name

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the base type name for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
String of base name

briefdescription.para: Creates an object from this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The BaseHandle for the newly created object

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the creator function for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The creator function

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the number of actions for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The count

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the action name for the index.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
index
Index to lookup
Action name or empty string where index is invalid

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the number of signals for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The count

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the signal name for the index.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
index
Index to lookup
Signal name or empty string where index is invalid

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the number of event side type registered properties for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The count

briefdescription.para: Retrieves all the property indices for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
indices
Container of property indices
The container will be cleared

briefdescription.para: Retrieves all the child property indices for this type.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_3.20
indices
Container of property indices
The container will be cleared

briefdescription.para: Given a property index, retrieve the property name associated with it.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
index
The property index
The name of the property at the given index
DaliException
If index is not valid.
this method only works for custom registered properties

briefdescription.para: Given a child property name, retrieve the property index associated with it,.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_3.20
name
The name of the property at the given index,
The property index or Property::INVALID_INDEX

briefdescription.para: Given a child property index, retrieve the property name associated with it.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_3.20
index
The property index
The name of the property at the given index, or empty string if it does not exist

briefdescription.para: Given a child property index, retrieve the property name associated with it.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_3.20
index
The property index
The name of the property at the given index, or empty string if it does not exist

briefdescription.para: TypeInfo class for instantiation of registered types and introspection of their actions and signals.

detaileddescription.para: See TypeRegistry for methods of type registration and TypeInfo retrieval. @SINCE_1_0.0
